case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. FABIOLA GOMEZ HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-20-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, FABIOLA GOMEZ $2,345.16 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,345.16 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, FABIOLA GOMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 SERVED SEP-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, FABIOLA GOMEZ
ORDER CONTINUED TO DEC. 20, 2016 AT 10:00 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY, REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
